nasb.text: But if the sacrifice of his offering is a votive or a freewill offering, it shall be eaten on the day that he offers his sacrifice, and on the next day what is left of it may be eaten;

esv.text: But if the sacrifice of his offering is a vow offering or a freewill offering, it shall be eaten on the day that he offers his sacrifice, and on the next day what remains of it shall be eaten.

cnv.text: 他獻的供物若是還願祭，或是甘心祭，獻祭那日可以吃；剩下的，第二天也可以吃。

ccb.text: 如果是自愿献的或为了还愿而献的祭物，要在当天吃祭肉，剩下的可以留到第二天吃。
